title: BB84: The First Quantum Key Distribution Protocol
description: Master the BB84 quantum key distribution protocol - the foundation of quantum cryptography. Learn how quantum mechanics enables provably secure key exchange, detect eavesdropping, and understand the role of the no-cloning theorem.
learningObjectives: Explain the BB84 protocol step by step
Implement BB84 key generation and sifting
Calculate the quantum bit error rate (QBER)
Apply privacy amplification and error correction
Analyze the security of BB84 against intercept-resend attacks
